## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Apps Script runtime logic
- [ ] UI/card rendering
- [ ] Docs/runbooks
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual Gmail add-on check completed
- [ ] No secrets or tokens added to repository

## Marketplace Impact

- [ ] No new OAuth/security scopes
- [ ] If scopes changed, reviewer notes updated
- [ ] Listing/support/privacy docs updated when needed

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out any risk, migration step, or follow-up required after merge.
